display.purpose: Hero headline only; italic Navy spans for emphasis.

headline.purpose: Section titles, light and dark sections.

title.purpose: Product and card names — Playfair at small size.

body.purpose: Inter 300; Grafito on light, white .5–.6 opacity on dark.

label.purpose: Tracked uppercase whisper: eyebrows, nav, form labels, badges.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Product card hover on pointer devices; paired with translateY(-5px).

shadows.name: button-lift
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover; paired with translateY(-2px).

motion.name: ease-toast
motion.purpose: Payment toast entrance (gentle overshoot — the one exception).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Navy pill CTA; lifts with shadow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--navy, #2D3147); color: #fff; padding: 14px 36px; border: none; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .3s, box-shadow .3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(45,49,71,.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--navy, #2D3147); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Hairline pill; border and text turn Navy on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--grafito, #7A7975); padding: 14px 36px; border: 1px solid var(--linea, #D9D8D3); border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .3s, color .3s, transform .3s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--navy, #2D3147); color: var(--navy, #2D3147); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--navy, #2D3147); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Catalog filter pill; active state tints Navy at 5%.
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 8px 18px; border: 1px solid var(--linea, #D9D8D3); border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--ash, #B7B4AC); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: .25s; } .ds-chip:hover, .ds-chip-active { border-color: var(--navy, #2D3147); color: var(--navy, #2D3147); background: rgba(45,49,71,.05); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Signature catalog card: snow image well, badge, serif name, price + circular add button.
components.html:
Nuevo
Toxina Botulínica
VOL:TENA 100U
Toxina botulínica tipo A de alta pureza, certificación KFDA.
$2,400
components.css: .ds-pcard { width: 280px; background: var(--paper, #F4F3EF); border: 1px solid var(--linea, #D9D8D3); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: transform .4s, box-shadow .4s; } .ds-pcard:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 20px 48px rgba(45,49,71,.1); } .ds-pcard-img { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 2/1; background: var(--snow, #FBFAF7); } .ds-pbadge { position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; background: var(--navy, #2D3147); color: #fff; } .ds-pcard-info { padding: 18px 20px; } .ds-pcat { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ash, #B7B4AC); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-pname { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--tinta, #0E0E0E); } .ds-pdesc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--grafito, #7A7975); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-pfooter { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid var(--bone, #ECEAE4); } .ds-pprice { font-weight: 600; font-size: 20px; color: var(--navy, #2D3147); } .ds-add { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid var(--linea, #D9D8D3); background: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--navy, #2D3147); font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: .3s; } .ds-add:hover { background: var(--navy, #2D3147); color: #fff; border-color: var(--navy, #2D3147); transform: scale(1.1); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Quiet form field; border shifts Navy on focus, no glow.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; width: 280px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ash, #B7B4AC); } .ds-input { padding: 12px 16px; background: var(--paper, #F4F3EF); border: 1px solid var(--linea, #D9D8D3); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--tinta, #0E0E0E); font-size: 14px; font-family: inherit; outline: none; transition: border-color .3s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--navy, #2D3147); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--ash, #B7B4AC); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Uppercase tracked link with Navy underline scaling in from the left.
components.html: ProductosNosotrosCotizar
components.css: .ds-navlink { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--grafito, #7A7975); text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color .3s; } .ds-navlink:hover { color: var(--tinta, #0E0E0E); } .ds-navlink::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: var(--navy, #2D3147); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform .3s; } .ds-navlink:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-nav-cta { padding: 10px 24px; background: var(--navy, #2D3147); color: #fff; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 11px; transition: opacity .3s; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { color: #fff; opacity: .85; } .ds-nav-cta::after { display: none; }

components.name: Newsletter Input (on dark)
components.description: Pill input for Navy sections; white at graded opacities.
components.css: .ds-nl-wrap { display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 24px; background: var(--navy, #2D3147); border-radius: 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-nl-input { flex: 1; min-width: 180px; padding: 13px 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15); border-radius: 50px; color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-family: inherit; outline: none; transition: border-color .3s; } .ds-nl-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,.35); } .ds-nl-input:focus { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); } .ds-nl-btn { padding: 13px 28px; background: #fff; color: var(--navy, #2D3147); border: none; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity .3s; } .ds-nl-btn:hover { opacity: .9; }

narrative.overview:
A couture workshop run with medical precision. The surface is paper and ink — warm editorial neutrals (Paper, Snow, Bone) separated by hairline rules — with a single signature color, Navy, carrying every accent: prices, italics, buttons, badges. Playfair Display speaks in the voice of a prestigious journal; Inter, set light and tracked-out in tiny uppercase labels, does the quiet administrative work around it. Density is low and deliberate: 100px section rhythm on desktop, generous line-height, one idea per section.

The system explicitly rejects everything PRODUCT.md rejects: gray-market pharma clutter (price badges everywhere, urgency tactics), generic pink-pastel beauty e-commerce, and interchangeable template landing pages. Restraint is the trust signal — the page must always read "official distributor," never "discount reseller." Dark sections (the Navy VOL:TENA showcase, the Tinta footer, the Navy newsletter band) are dramatic interludes in an otherwise light, airy composition.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-and-ink editorial palette; Navy as the only voice of color
Serif display (Playfair) + light humanist sans (Inter) pairing
Hairline 1px borders (Línea) instead of shadows for structure
Pill-shaped interactive elements throughout (buttons, chips, badges)
Tiny tracked uppercase labels as the system's navigational whisper
Mobile-first pragmatism: GPU-heavy effects disabled under 640px

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Navy is the only chromatic color in the system. Never introduce a second accent; emphasis beyond Navy is achieved with Tinta weight or Playfair italics.

rules.name: The Ash Whisper Rule
rules.body: Ash is reserved for ≤12px uppercase labels and placeholders. It fails body-text contrast on Paper by design — running paragraphs must use Grafito or darker, never Ash.

rules.name: The Dark Interlude Rule
rules.body: Full-bleed dark sections (Navy or Tinta) appear at most as punctuation between light sections — showcase, newsletter, footer. On dark, text is white at graded opacities (.4 labels / .5–.6 body / 1.0 headlines), never gray hexes.

rules.name: The Italic Emphasis Rule
rules.body: Emphasis inside a headline is an italic Playfair span (Navy on light, reduced-opacity white on dark) — never bold, never a second color.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; a shadow always means "this is hovering or floating right now." Decorative resting shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do keep Navy (#2D3147) as the only accent — emphasis is Navy, italics, or Tinta weight, nothing else.
Do separate surfaces with 1px Línea borders and one-step tonal shifts (Paper ↔ Snow ↔ Bone).
Do use pill shapes (50px) for every interactive element: buttons, chips, badges, dark-section inputs.
Do write body copy in Grafito (#7A7975) or darker; reserve Ash strictly for small uppercase labels.
Do respect mobile performance doctrine: no backdrop-filter, no float animations, no Three.js canvas, simplified shadows under 640px — and keep touch targets ≥44px.
Do keep section rhythm airy: 100px desktop / 52px mobile vertical padding.
donts: Don't look like a gray-market pharma shop — no urgency timers, no stacked discount badges, no fake trust seals (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't drift into generic beauty e-commerce — no pinks, no pastels, no retail-skincare styling (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't assemble template landing-page sections with stock icons — every section earns its custom layout (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't add resting shadows to cards or decorative glows; flat at rest is doctrine.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders, or a second accent color under any circumstance.
Don't set running text in Ash on Paper — it fails contrast; if it's more than a label, it's Grafito or darker.
